Thanks for it, I was actually curious if new deployment passed security tests according to containers resource constraints for multicloud-* pods. As far as I'm aware, this CI flow includes this tests?
Anyway as you wrote, there is some other test ongoing, I'll check tomorrow. I think it's safe to add now interested parties for this change if general deployment was kind of OK :).

Patch Set 4:

NOTICE: I didn't field-test this patch, numbers here are based on `docker container stats` of few unconstrained mongos/etcds running here and there (multicloud-k8s' mongo and etcd have much less load than compared ones) and sound reasonable for me. Gating CI also verified this positively I think

Could you tell from your perspective whether results of Gating CI are "Good Enough"? From my point of view they're good as HCs + Pod Limit Security Check are fine, however I've seen some smoketests failed (hopefully, env issue)..
